description: Promoted to Senior Associate Software Engineer after completing the Engineering Development Program — continuing on the same Business Insurance team with expanded cross-service ownership and technical scope.

Cleared a ~100-issue defect backlog to unblock a major release of the company's commercial insurance pricing platform. Shipped 23 pull requests across 3 services and delivered 50 code reviews across 13 repositories. Diagnosed and resolved a decade-old production defect causing premium miscalculations, coordinating the fix across multiple teams to production. Earned two GenAI certifications and joined the enterprise Security Champions program, applying AI and secure-development practices to delivery.

Contributed to Core Capabilities team projects within the Business Insurance Product Value Stream, focusing on cloud modernization. Led the migration of over 11 policies to a modernized format, reducing data management overhead. Conducted unit and integration testing. Participated in Agile sprint planning, stand-ups, and retrospectives.

Troubleshot network connectivity issues and collaborated with the network team to diagnose and resolve problems. Assisted in installing and configuring new network equipment, documenting network diagrams, and maintaining inventory.
